prompt: Edit image 1, a collage artwork. Modify the central circular cardboard element and single hand to resemble a collage version of the clock face and hands from image 2, incorporating the clean clock numbers and distinct hands into the existing textures.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, a collage artwork. Transform the central circular cardboard element and the existing single hand into a functional clock face. The clock face should incorporate the clear, bold numbers and distinct black hour/minute hands, and the red second hand from image 2. Ensure these new clock elements appear seamlessly integrated as a collage, maintaining the textures and artistic style of image 1.
objects: Central circular cardboard element (as part of the clock face)
